allow: Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('OK - app started'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('App OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('OK - blueprints:', [r.name for r in app.blueprints.values\(\)]\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import importlib.metadata as m; [print\(f'{p}=={m.version\(p\)}'\) for p in ['flask','werkzeug','jinja2','click','markupsafe','itsdangerous']]")
